programme.title: Aquaman and the Lost Kingdom
programme.desc: After failing to defeat Aquaman the first time, Black Manta wields the power of the mythic Black Trident to unleash an ancient and malevolent force. Hoping to end his reign of terror, Aquaman forges an unlikely alliance with his brother, Orm, the former king of Atlantis. Setting aside their differences, they join forces to protect their kingdom and save the world from irreversible destruction.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: Spider-Man: Homecoming
programme.desc: Thrilled by his experience with the Avengers, young Peter Parker returns home to live with his Aunt May. Under the watchful eye of mentor Tony Stark, Parker starts to embrace his newfound identity as Spider-Man. He also tries to return to his normal daily routine -- distracted by thoughts of proving himself to be more than just a friendly neighborhood superhero. Peter must soon put his powers to the test when the evil Vulture emerges to threaten everything that he holds dear.

rating.system: Saskatchewan Film and Video Classification Board
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard volunteers to sign for a package, hoping to make a good impression on Penny.

Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard, realizing his pursuit of Penny is fruitless, has an unexpected encounter with a fellow scientist (Sara Gilbert).

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Penny starts dating Leonard's handsome colleague; Leonard and his friends are tortured by Sheldon's obsession with gift-giving etiquette.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Koothrappali and Leonard take Wolowitz to Las Vegas; Sheldon is forced to bunk with Penny when he gets locked out of his apartment.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: An attractive comic book artist tests Leonard and Priya's relationship; Sheldon tries to scare his friends.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales

programme.title: Foul Play With Anthony Davis
programme.desc: Turning the tables on the locker-room dynamic, athletes from all sports pull pranks on their oblivious teammates and sports-world friends. The team behind Impractical Jokers helps them see the prank through from the opening tip-off to the final buzzer.

programme.title: Central Intelligence
programme.desc: Bullied as a teen for being overweight, Bob Stone shows up to his high school reunion looking fit and muscular. While there, he finds Calvin Joyner, a fast-talking accountant who misses his glory days as a popular athlete. Stone is now a lethal CIA agent who needs Calvin's number skills to help him save the compromised U.S. spy satellite system. Together, the former classmates encounter shootouts, espionage and double-crosses while trying to prevent worldwide chaos.

rating.system: Saskatchewan Film and Video Classification Board
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales

programme.title: Horrible Bosses 2
programme.desc: Tired of always answering to others, Nick (Jason Bateman), Dale (Charlie Day) and Kurt (Jason Sudeikis) go into business for themselves. After demonstrating the prototype for an invention called the Shower Buddy, the guys attract the attention of Rex Hanson and his father, Bert. Bert invests in the trio's product, then cancels the order and steals their idea. Now heavily in debt and with no legal recourse, Nick, Dale and Kurt decide to kidnap Rex and use the ransom money to pay off their loans.

rating.system: Saskatchewan Film and Video Classification Board
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: House Party
programme.desc: Aspiring club promoters and best buddies Damon and Kevin are barely keeping things together. Out of money, down on their luck and about to lose the roofs over their heads, they need a huge windfall to make their problems go away. They soon decide to host the party of the year at an exclusive mansion, which just happens to belong to none other than NBA superstar LeBron James. What could go wrong?

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales

programme.title: Foul Play With Anthony Davis
programme.desc: LeBron James and super agent Rich Paul team up with Anthony Davis to prank NBA star Draymond Green with an ultra-exclusive investment opportunity, while Olympic gymnast Jordan Chiles traps WNBA star Rickea Jackson in a parking-lot nightmare.

programme.title: Foul Play With Anthony Davis
programme.desc: Turning the tables on the locker-room dynamic, athletes from all sports pull pranks on their oblivious teammates and sports-world friends. The team behind Impractical Jokers helps them see the prank through from the opening tip-off to the final buzzer.

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One With the Dirty Girl
programme.desc: Ross starts dating a beautiful but messy co-worker from the museum; Monica and Phoebe cater a sad event.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One Where Chandler Crosses the Line
programme.desc: Chandler faces a tough choice after his passionate kiss with Joey's girlfriend; Rachel has to learn about dining alone.

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One With Chandler in a Box
programme.desc: To atone for kissing Joey's girlfriend, Chandler agrees to stay inside a shipping crate during the Thanksgiving holiday.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One Where They're Going to Party!
programme.desc: Rachel's career is obstructed by her boss, Joanna; Monica faces a big decision; Chandler, Ross and Joey party.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One With the Girl From Poughkeepsie
programme.desc: Ross struggles to maintain a long-distance relationship; Chandler's well-intended attempts to get Rachel a date seem to miss the mark; Monica's plan to assert some authority at her new restaurant goes awry.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Phoebe's brother (Giovanni Ribisi) asks her to carry a baby for him and his wife; Chandler gets lessons in love; Joey finds himself in a class struggle.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Phoebe undergoes an embryo implant procedure to become a surrogate mother for her brother and his wife; Monica and Rachel wager their apartment in a trivia game against Chandler and Joey.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Chandler has a hard time handling Kathy's new role in a play, in which she pretends to have sex with a handsome man.

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One With Joey's Dirty Day
programme.desc: A visit to a strip joint fails to cheer up Chandler; Rachel gets Ross to go to an opera; Charlton Heston finds Joey in a compromising position during a movie shoot.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One With All the Rugby
programme.desc: Chandler runs into Janice, now divorced, and finds her more irritating than ever; Ross plays rugby to impress Emily; Monica tries to figure out what a mysterious electrical switch in her new apartment does.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One With the Fake Party
programme.desc: Rachel throws Emily a phony going-away party so she can see Joshua outside of work, and pregnant Phoebe craves meat.

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One With the Free Porn
programme.desc: Ross tells Emily (Helen Baxendale) how he feels about her; Chandler and Joey suddenly receive a free adult TV channel in their apartment; Phoebe gets some surprising news about her pregnancy.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One With Rachel's New Dress
programme.desc: Ross has concerns about Emily's interests; Rachel's plans for Joshua are upset by a late change of venue.

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One With All the Haste
programme.desc: Ross tries to keep Emily from returning to London; Monica and Rachel attempt to win back their apartment.

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One With the Wedding Dresses
programme.desc: Monica and Phoebe find life in wedding attire has its charm; Rachel asks Joshua for more spontaneity.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Rachel and Ross reminisce separately about when they dated each other; the friends get invitations to Ross's wedding, but not all of them are going.

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One With the Worst Best Man Ever
programme.desc: After Joey almost loses Ross' wedding ring, Ross asks both Joey and Chandler to serve as his best man; the girls host a baby shower for Phoebe.

programme.title: Family Matters
programme.desc: Obsessive Myra invades Steve's school; Harriette faces a possible layoff.

programme.title: Family Matters
programme.desc: A tough guy tries to collect Eddie's gambling debts.

programme.title: Family Matters
programme.desc: Eddie hires Waldo, who is down on himself, to work at the Mighty Weenie.

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.sub-title: A Perfect Score and a Bunsen Burner Marshmallow
programme.desc: Sheldon moves in with Dr. Sturgis for the weekend to see what his life will be like in college; a lonely Mary tries to bond with the other Coopers during Sheldon's absence.

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.sub-title: A Political Campaign and a Candy Land Cheater
programme.desc: Unhappy that school funds are going toward football rather than academics, Sheldon decides to run for class president.

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.sub-title: A Proposal and a Popsicle Stick Cross
programme.desc: Georgie is thrilled when Veronica stays at the Coopers' house for a few days; Meemaw and Dr. Sturgis celebrate their one-year anniversary.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.sub-title: A Broken Heart and a Crock Monster
programme.desc: The Coopers help Pastor Jeff through a rough patch in his marriage; Sheldon pressures church members for donations when Mary takes him to work for a day.

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.sub-title: A Swedish Science Thing and the Equation for Toast
programme.desc: Sheldon invites the entire school to a party for the Nobel Prize announcements; Meemaw learns more about Dr. Sturgis' past; Georgie's desire for cable TV leads to a standoff between him and George Sr.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.sub-title: Quirky Eggheads and Texas Snow Globes
programme.desc: After Dr. Sturgis experiences a nervous breakdown, Mary worries Sheldon is headed down a similar path; Georgie discovers he has a knack for sales.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Rachel frantically tries to get to London to tell Ross that she loves him before he marries Emily; Ross' parents argue with Emily's parents, Steven and Andrea Waltham.

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One After Ross Says Rachel
programme.desc: Ross is distraught over the wedding; Emily punches Ross and flees from the reception; Monica and Chandler try to control their passions.

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One With All the Kissing
programme.desc: Monica and Chandler are caught in a passionate embrace but try to prove it was innocent: Ross' wife won't speak to him; Phoebe feels neglected; Rachel appoints Monica as her advisor in romance.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Phoebe prepares to give birth, but the doctor makes her nervous; Joey gets admitted in great pain; Monica plans a date with a male nurse to spite Chandler.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One Where Phoebe Hates PBS
programme.desc: Ross' estranged bride makes him an offer; Phoebe deals with traumatic memories of PBS; Monica gets upset at Chandler when he gloats about sex; Joey challenges Phoebe to perform a completely selfless act.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: An exchange between Ross and Rachel threatens to break up the friends; Chandler and Monica plan a romantic weekend getaway together; Joey finds out about Monica and Chandler.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Phoebe is surprised to discover that she enjoys wearing mink; Ross confronts Emily, and she demands a divorce; Monica and Rachel are afraid of a hairy new neighbor, until they find out how handsome he is with his hair cut.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One Where Ross Moves In
programme.desc: Personal habits clash when Ross moves in with Chandler and Joey; Phoebe dates a health inspector (Gregory Sporleder); Rachel schemes to get her new neighbor to ask her out on a date.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One With the Thanksgiving Flashbacks
programme.desc: As the gang digests Monica's huge Thanksgiving meal, everyone reminisces about their worst Thanksgiving ever.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Ross becomes upset when someone at work takes his sandwich from the refrigerator and eats it; Joey finds himself in a mess when he tries to cover for Chandler and Monica's dating.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
